launchpool.title: Introducing Opinion (OPN) on Binance Launchpool! Farm OPN by Locking BNB, USDC, U, and USD1
launchpool.text:
Published on 2026-03-02 12:45
Users will be able to lock their BNB, USDC, U, and USD1 to receive OPN airdrops over 2 days, with farming starting from 2026-03-03 00:00 (UTC).
Binance will then list OPN at 2026-03-05 13:00 (UTC) and open trading with OPN/USDT, OPN/USDC, OPN/BNB, OPN/U, OPN/USD1 and OPN/TRY trading pairs.
OPN Launchpool Details:
Supported Pools:
Lock BNB
Farming Period: 2026-03-03 00:00 (UTC) to 2026-03-04 23:59 (UTC)
Snapshots of user balances and total pool balances will be taken multiple times at any point of time each hour to get users’ hourly average balances and calculate user rewards. Each pool’s annual percentage yield (APY) and total pool balance will be updated in real time.

hodler.title: Introducing Avantis (AVNT) on Binance HODLer Airdrops! Earn AVNT With Retroactive BNB Simple Earn Subscriptions
hodler.text:
Published on 2025-09-16 09:30
Users who subscribed their BNB to Simple Earn (Flexible and/or Locked) and/or On-Chain Yields products from 2025-09-06 00:00 (UTC) to 2025-09-08 23:59 (UTC) will get the airdrops distribution. The HODLer Airdrops information is estimated to be available in 24 hours, and the new token is estimated to be distributed to users’ Spot Accounts by 2025-09-16 13:00 (UTC).
AVNT HODLer Airdrops Details
Introducing Binance HODLer Airdrops
Binance HODLer Airdrops is a program that rewards BNB holders with token airdrops based on historical snapshots of their BNB balances.
